case_title: KIM HA TRAN VS. HOWARD HSU et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KIM HA AS TO DEFENDANT HSU, HOWARD AN INDIVIDUAL Q ENTERTAINMENT SF, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY DBA CLUB Q JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
